WH Docbots Docbots are medical robots, They range in ‘complexity from simple first-aid bots to fully automatic” surgery.and:intensive-care_ units Each model i rated for ts medical skill, from the Docbot Model I (medical skill of 4) tothe roomsized Dochot Model Xil {medical skill of 15), The dochot most familiar to Toubleshooters is the Model V (skill of 8). The body is shaped Tike « smal, powerful human dwart, and it can almost anywhere a human can, In-its massive t180 it stores the equivalent of a small mobile medical unit, including a veritable digs (pain-killers pharmacopela of 
coagulants, peptides, amphetamines, emetics, etc.), medical supplies, a small chemical/ biological analysis unit, an ample supply of plastflesh, and emergency surgical gear. Since the Model V can set limbs, staunch bleeding, and seal all but the most ghastly wounds, even a very serious injury need not lead to death if a Model V is nearby.
